paper.title: OB runaway stars originating in the Vel OB1 association

review.summary: Five internal tables: young cluster parameters in Vel OB1 (tab:parori), bow-shock parameters of runaway stars (tab:estpar1), literature candidate members (tab:par1), astrometric/kinematic properties of OB runaways (tab:parrun), and kinematical age estimates (tab:parrunori). One external resource: the CMD isochrone web tool used for age determination.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Lists the astrometric, kinematic, and derived properties of six young stellar clusters identified in the Vel OB1 association based on Gaia DR3 membership analysis.

columns.name: \noalign Name | -
columns.meaning: Name of the cluster or region

columns.name: N | -
columns.meaning: Number of member stars based on membership probability

columns.name: Parallax | (mas)
columns.meaning: Mean Gaia DR3 parallax with uncertainty

columns.name: \mu_l^* | (mas yr^-1)
columns.meaning: Mean proper motion in Galactic longitude direction

columns.name: \mu_b | (mas yr^-1)
columns.meaning: Mean proper motion in Galactic latitude direction

columns.name: V_LSR | (km s^-1)
columns.meaning: Tangential velocity relative to the local standard of rest

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Lists adopted stellar-wind parameters and empirically estimated ambient ISM number densities derived from observed bow shocks and putative Strömgren spheres around OB runaway stars in the Vel OB1 region.

source_refs.caption: Adopted and estimated parameters of the observed bow shock around the runaway stars.
source_refs.label: tab:estpar1

columns.name: n_\rm ISM^\rm BS | (cm^-3)
columns.meaning: Ambient ISM number density from ram-pressure balance (bow-shock method)

columns.name: n_\rm ISM^\rm St | (cm^-3)
columns.meaning: Ambient ISM number density from Strömgren-sphere relation

columns.name: R_\rm St | (^\circ)
columns.meaning: Angular radius of the putative Strömgren sphere from WISE 22 um image

columns.name: R | (arcsec)
columns.meaning: Standoff distance of the bow shock

internal_tables.evidence: Adopted and estimated parameters of the observed bow shock around the runaway stars.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Comprehensive catalog of candidate members of the Vel OB1 association compiled from the literature, with Gaia DR3 astrometry, kinematics, spectral types, and membership/runaway/bow-shock flags.

source_refs.caption: Candidate members of Vel~OB1 according to literature.
source_refs.label: tab:par1

columns.name: \mu_l^* | (mas yr^-1)
columns.meaning: Proper motion in Galactic longitude direction

columns.name: \mu_b | (mas yr^-1)
columns.meaning: Proper motion in Galactic latitude direction

columns.name: \multicolumn2cV_\rm pec | LSR | (km s^-1)
columns.meaning: Peculiar or transverse velocity relative to the LSR

columns.name: Member | Vel OB1 | (km s^-1)
columns.meaning: Peculiar or transverse velocity relative to Vel OB1

columns.name: Ref (SpT,V_r) | -
columns.meaning: Membership flag (Y=member, N=non-member, R=runaway, B=bow shock)
Literature reference for spectral type and radial velocity

internal_tables.evidence: Candidate members of Vel~OB1 according to literature.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Astrometric and kinematic properties of confirmed and candidate OB runaway stars in the Vel OB1 area, including peculiar velocities, Galactic-plane distances, bow-shock detections, and alignment angles.

source_refs.caption: Astrometric and kinematic properties of the OB runaway stars in the area of Vel~OB1.
source_refs.label: tab:parrun

columns.name: \mu_l^* | (mas yr^-1)
columns.meaning: Proper motion in Galactic longitude direction

columns.name: \mu_b | (mas yr^-1)
columns.meaning: Proper motion in Galactic latitude direction

columns.name: \multicolumn3cV_\rm pec | 2D (LSR) | (km s^-1)
columns.meaning: 2D transverse peculiar velocity relative to LSR

columns.name: Bow shock | (Vel OB1) | (km s^-1)
columns.meaning: Peculiar velocity relative to Vel OB1

columns.name: Angle | -
columns.meaning: Bow-shock detection flag (Y=detected, N=not detected, ISM?=uncertain)
Alignment status of the bow shock with the stellar proper-motion vector

columns.name: (deg)
columns.meaning: Misalignment angle between bow-shock axis and proper-motion direction

internal_tables.evidence: Astrometric and kinematic properties of the OB runaway stars in the area of Vel~OB1.

internal_tables.role_in_paper: Kinematical age estimates of OB runaway stars in Vel OB1, derived from backward integration to the Galactic plane or to proposed parent clusters, with corresponding ejection velocities.

source_refs.caption: Estimate of the kinematical age of the OB runaways in Vel~OB1.
source_refs.label: tab:parrunori

columns.name: \noalign \centering Name | -
columns.meaning: Name of the OB runaway star

columns.name: V_pecLSR | (km s^-1)
columns.meaning: Transverse or peculiar velocity relative to LSR (bold when radial included)

columns.name: Runaway direction | -
columns.meaning: Runaway direction: A=away from plane, P=parallel, T=toward plane

columns.name: Age_\rm kinGP | (Myr)
columns.meaning: Kinematic age assuming origin at b=0, 1, or 2 degrees

columns.name: D_\rm par | (pc)
columns.meaning: Distance of the proposed parent cluster

columns.name: Age_\rm kinpar | (Myr)
columns.meaning: Kinematic age if ejected from the proposed parent cluster

columns.name: V_\rm pecpar | (km s^-1)
columns.meaning: Peculiar transverse velocity relative to the proposed parent cluster (bold when radial included)

internal_tables.evidence: Estimate of the kinematical age of the OB runaways in Vel~OB1.

external_resources.description: Web interface to the PARSEC stellar evolution tracks and isochrones, used to determine cluster ages and extinctions via color-magnitude diagram fitting.
